description_long: This is a tall, polygonal plastic bottle with a spray nozzle, designed for dispensing liquid. The bottle features a predominantly white body with bold red horizontal bands near the top and bottom, and a series of star motifs in varying sizes along the sides. The front label displays product information, including the words 'anti-static spray' and 'screen cleaning anti-static 250ml', along with a barcode and QR code. The cap is a white, ribbed spray pump, suitable for controlled application of the contents. The overall design is utilitarian, with clear labeling and a modern, slightly angular silhouette. The bottle appears lightweight and portable, suitable for personal or office use.
description: A tall, white plastic spray bottle with red bands, star motifs, and a labeled front for anti-static screen cleaning. It features a ribbed spray nozzle and a modern, angular shape.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main label with 'anti-static spray' text and product details.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the red bands and large star motifs, with minimal text visible.
description_view_2: Angled view displaying the '5 Star office' branding, star graphics, and part of the product label.
description_view_3: Rear view showing detailed usage instructions, barcode, QR code, and additional product information.
attribute_label_text:
anti-static spray
5 Star office
screen cleaning anti-static 250ml
For use on the surface of computer and television screens. Reduces static charge and removes surface grime.
250ml
attribute_bottle_silhouette: tall and polygonal with a straight body and a narrow neck
attribute_packaging_graphics: multiple red stars of varying sizes, horizontal red bands at the top and bottom
